title: The War to End All Wars: The Movie
original_title: The War to End All Wars - The Movie
overview: "The War To End All Wars - The Movie" is an animated musical and historical journey that brings to life stories from World War 1. It features music from Sabaton's 10th studio album, "The War To End All Wars".
